# citrix_quickdeploy_onprem_network_connection (Data Source)

Data Source of an Citrix Managed Azure VNet Peering.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get details of a Citrix QuickDeploy On-Prem Network Connection by name
data "citrix_quickdeploy_onprem_network_connection" "example_network_connection" {
    name = "example-network-connection-name"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the VNet Peering.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) GUID identifier of the VNet Peering.
